title: quintinia serrata
intro: Quintinia serrata, also known as the New Zealand tawheru, is a small tree or shrub native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to alleviate respiratory issues and soothe skin irritations. The health benefits of Quintinia serrata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and support immune system health. Quintinia serrata can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in topical applications, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
